title: DC Electricity
description: Current, potential difference, resistance and Ohm's law; series and parallel circuits; and EMF, internal resistance and potential dividers.
objectives: Define current, charge and potential difference and relate them via I = Q/t and V = W/Q
State and apply Ohm's law (V = IR) and calculate resistance from resistivity data using R = ρL/A
Calculate electrical power and energy using P = IV = I²R = V²/R and E = Pt
Analyse series and parallel circuits using the rules for current, potential difference and total resistance
Apply ε = I(R + r) and V = ε - Ir to circuits with internal resistance, and calculate potential-divider outputs

lessons.title: Current, potential difference and Ohm's law
EMF, internal resistance and potential dividers
